skill.name: context-management-context-restore
skill.description: A skill for restoring and rehydrating project context in AI workflows using semantic memory techniques
skill.summary: Restore AI project context using semantic memory rehydration for seamless workflow continuation
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill is a documentation/guide file containing no executable code. Static findings for 'external_commands' and 'weak cryptographic algorithm' are false positives - the flagged lines contain markdown documentation, code examples in fenced blocks, and YAML frontmatter, not actual shell execution or cryptographic implementations.

high_findings.confidence_reasoning: All flagged locations are markdown documentation or code examples in fenced blocks, not executable shell commands

high_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Detection

high_findings.confidence_reasoning: No cryptographic algorithms or implementations exist in this skill file

content.user_title: Restore AI Context with Semantic Memory
content.value_statement: This skill helps AI assistants recover and reconstruct project context across complex workflows, enabling seamless continuation of long-running tasks without losing critical information.
actual_capabilities: Provides semantic vector search strategies for context retrieval
Implements relevance filtering and ranking for context components
Offers context rehydration patterns with token budget management
Supports session state reconstruction for multi-agent workflows
Includes context merging and conflict resolution strategies
limitations: Requires external vector database or storage for context persistence
Does not execute actual context restoration - provides guidance only
Token budget limits apply based on the AI model context window

use_cases.title: Resume complex AI projects
use_cases.description: When returning to a long-running AI project after interruption, use this skill to reconstruct the full context including decisions, architecture, and current state.
use_cases.target_user: Developers working on extended AI-assisted projects

use_cases.title: Cross-project knowledge transfer
use_cases.description: Transfer semantic knowledge and context between related projects, maintaining consistency and preserving architectural decisions.
use_cases.target_user: Teams managing multiple related AI projects

use_cases.title: Multi-agent workflow coordination
use_cases.description: Enable multiple AI agents to share and restore context, maintaining coherent decision trails across complex collaborative workflows.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Context Restoration
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to restore context for project [project-name]. The context is stored at [storage-location]. Please guide me through the restoration process using full restoration mode.
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new session with an existing project

prompt_templates.title: Incremental Context Update
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me implement incremental context restoration for my project. I want to update only the changed components since my last session.
prompt_templates.scenario: Updating project context with recent changes

prompt_templates.title: Semantic Context Query
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to retrieve specific context about [topic] from my project. Show me how to use semantic vector search to find the most relevant information.
prompt_templates.scenario: Finding specific information within project context

prompt_templates.title: Context Validation
prompt_templates.prompt: Guide me through validating restored context against the current codebase. I want to ensure consistency and integrity before continuing work.

output_examples.input: How do I implement context restoration for my AI project?
output_examples.output: To implement context restoration, follow these core steps: 1) Identify your context storage location (vector DB or file system), 2) Choose restoration mode (full/incremental/diff), 3) Set token budget and relevance threshold, 4) Apply semantic retrieval strategies, 5) Validate restored context against codebase. Would you like me to elaborate on any specific step?

output_examples.input: What strategies help maintain context quality?
output_examples.output: Key strategies include: semantic vector search with cosine similarity, multi-stage relevance scoring with temporal decay, incremental context loading to manage token budgets, and cryptographic context signatures for integrity verification. Would you like detailed implementation guidance for any of these?

best_practices: Always validate restored context against the current codebase before continuing work
Use semantic similarity thresholds (0.75+) to filter irrelevant context components
Implement incremental updates instead of full restoration when possible to save tokens
anti_patterns: Restoring full context without relevance filtering - leads to token overflow
Skipping context validation - may reintroduce outdated or inconsistent information
Ignoring token budget limits - causes context truncation and information loss

faq.question: What is context restoration in Claude Code?
faq.answer: Context restoration is the process of recovering and reconstructing project knowledge, decisions, and state from previous AI assistant sessions, enabling seamless workflow continuation.

faq.question: Do I need a vector database?
faq.answer: A vector database is recommended for semantic context retrieval, but you can also use file-system based storage depending on your project complexity.

faq.question: What token budget should I use?
faq.answer: Default is 8192 tokens, but adjust based on your model context window. Leave room for current task execution beyond restored context.

faq.question: How does semantic similarity work?
faq.answer: Semantic similarity uses embedding models to convert context into vectors, then measures cosine similarity between vectors to find conceptually related content.

faq.question: Can this skill execute context restoration?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides guidance, best practices, and implementation patterns. Actual execution requires integrating with your specific infrastructure.

faq.question: What is incremental context restoration?
faq.answer: Incremental restoration updates only changed components since the last session, rather than loading all context. This saves tokens and improves efficiency.
